parameters:
...I don't know who is reading this... \n[1], or perhaps Mana... In any case, let me
make my excuses to you here at the end.

I never wanted that girl to be unhappy. This was just a transaction. She and I both
sought power at the same time, and this was the only way.

I intend to entrust everything to our new queen. If she desires the extinction of the
demon clan, I will obey even that. My wish is just one.

I don't want to rot away in this false body. I'm not afraid to die. I just don't want
to die while I'm not myself.

Inside that golden castle where I pledged loyalty to the Demon King-sama... I want to
regain my real body and walk just once more. That is the only wish left to me........

...You've come. From now on, we will be exposing the villagers' sacred statue. Our
actions will be a betrayal to them.

If the villagers find us, we won't escape lynching. Trampling and destroying the
object of their faith... Do you have the resolve for that?

...I see. If you say so, then there's no helping it. ........That girl will remain
trapped in this village for her entire life.
........I'll do it. To save Elly, I... am prepared to bear any sin.
...Good, then let's go. Lead the way, \n[1]. Take me to that statue of His Excellency.

Oh, magnificent...! I can feel His Excellency right there...! As I thought, the Demon
King-sama slumbers there!
Ugh... Um, what should we do here? How do we break Elly's curse?
Ugh... Hah, ah........ What we can do is... *cough*! Guh...!
L-Lord!? Hey, are you okay!? Coughing up this much blood, your body...!

Ugh........ Ah... Don't worry, just... just a little more........ You don't need to
do anything anymore... The rest, we'll leave entirely to her choice........

\n[1]... Lord........ You've done it...! I never truly thought the two of you would
plot to desecrate the grave........!
V-Village Chief!? Everyone!? Why are you all here at this hour...!?

A letter arrived informing us of your plot! That you two intended to defile our
ancestors' spirit monument to break Elly's curse!

Wh-why!? The plan to vandalize this statue was just...! No one else could have known
about this besides us...!

Lord... Even if you are a noble of the Kingdom, we cannot forgive this matter. You
will atone with your own body for the crime of insulting our ancestors. Although...
in your condition, you'll likely pass on soon.

...Damn it, at this point, we have no choice but to fight. Somehow incapacitate
everyone without hurting them...

Whoa there, \n[1]! Don't draw that sword! Do you not care what happens to this bitch,
huh!?
Ugh! Eh, Elly!? Let her go, what are you planning to do with Elly!? Dario!

...I didn't want to do this either........ But if you're saying you'll kill us with
that sword... Then I'll have to kill Elly.

I-It's fine! Big brother! I don't care what happens to me! These bastards are trying
to kill you! Th-that's not okay!

B-Big brother...! You can't die in a place like this! You're supposed to travel the
world with Mana-chan and help lots of people, right!? Then don't worry about me! Just
defeat everyone────Ahh!?

Tch! Elly! What the hell are you saying!? You're our woman, yet you're taking his
side! You stupid bitch! You...!
Ggh!? L-Let go of me, D-Dario...! Ugh, ahh!! S-Stop...!

Dario! S-Stop it! Please, just spare Elly! Spare Elly! It's all my fault! If you want
to hurt someone, hurt only me!

...\n[1], I always thought of you as my own child... But today, that affection has
completely cooled.

From now on, we'll all beat you straight with sticks... If you're still alive by
dawn, we'll forgive your crimes.
Gyaaahhh! Guuuh! Ooh! Ahh, O King...! Please... save us!! Gyaaahhh!!

Ggh........! S-Stop it! Big brother's going to die!! Please, Village Chief! Everyone!
Hey────Ahh!?

Tch! Shut the hell up! Just shut up and watch from there! Watch your big brother get
beaten to death!
Aah! Nooo!! Big brother! Big brooother!! Stop it, stop! Waaahh!!

Oops, did I go too far...? Damn it, coming at me with that frail body... Just stay
down and sleep there........

Tch...! Wh-why... I... didn't care what happened to me........ But why... is
Elly........hurt so badly........tch

Tch...my consciousness is fading........ Ah, I'm sorry, Elly........ I just wanted to
save you, but I..............

........Ahh, Demon King... Here is one who seeks your power........ Please show
mercy........ Extend a helping hand to that weak girl........

...My clothes, from when I was a child... What is this...a dream...? But if it
is........it's so cold here........!
...Ugh, ehh........ It's dark, it's lonely........ Big brother, Mana-chan........
Ah! Wait! Wait, where are you going! Don't leave me behind! Hey, I said wait!
Wait........Wait! Hey, listen to me! Wh-why...! Both of you...! Look over here...!
Uuhh...! Hah...! H-hey! Don't leave me behind! Please........stop........!

...Tch, I'm...really slow on my feet! I'm...not like big brother and the others...!
My body and heart are weak...! I'm a scaredy-cat coward who can't even leave the
village...!

So why are you leaving...! Don't leave me all alone...! Big bro, Mana-chaaan...tch,
ugh, aahhh........!

Ugh...n-no...! It's so cold here...and pitch black, with no one around........ I...I
don't want to be all alone........

...I'm going back. I don't want to stay in a place like this anymore. That
village...that must be where I belong........

I can't do it... I'll never catch up to the two of them........ ...I'm going
back........

Your true desire is different. ...You don't really want to give up, do you? You want
the power to never be abandoned by them...is that not so?

Fortunately, you possess the qualification. ...Receive that one's eyes. And become
our new queen.

...Those blue eyes, just like hers. Ah...it's been a year, I'd almost forgotten...
That's right...that girl had eyes like this too........

Those clear, beautiful eyes like a summer sky... To think I'd forgotten them so
completely in just a year. And yet...to remember them in a place like this........

Gghh........! A-ahh, it's hot........! M-my eyes, they're burning...ughh........
a-ahh.........
...I'm going back. To save big brother........

Phew...thank goodness...! I made it in time! Hah...! Whew~...! S-sorry...! Let me
catch my breath for a second...! Phew...!

........! Alright! It's been a while, Elly-chan! I've been wanting to see you...for
so long!

...! Th-that's...! Me too! It's been a whole year since we last met! I was so
lonely...! I was waiting all this time...! Ugh, waaahh...!

...Yeah, I'm sorry... \n[1] and I were so caught up in our own dreams... We...didn't
properly consider your feelings, Elly-chan.

Mmm, uhh~...! Sob... ...N-no...! I'm the one who should apologize...! I...kept lying
to myself and couldn't be honest with the two of you...!

I always wanted to stay with big brother and Mana-chan...! But I acted stubborn and
grown-up, putting on a brave face to see you off...! I could never say what I really
felt...it's my fault...!

...No, that's not true. It's my fault... If I hadn't thought that way, this ending
surely wouldn't have...

...I've always wanted to apologize to you, Elly-chan. About when we were kids,
playing house together... I really wanted to be \n[1]'s...w-wife...

...I said it without thinking, just casually... That siblings can't get
married........ Do you remember that time, Elly-chan?

I shouldn't have said something like that. I was trying to monopolize \n[1]... I tried
to separate \n[1] from you, Elly-chan...

...B-but that's...normal for everyone, isn't it...? Mana-chan was just telling the
truth... ...The one who was wrong...was me.........

That's not true, Elly-chan. Not being able to be with the person you love is strange.
Your feelings aren't wrong, Elly-chan.

...I'm sorry, Elly-chan. I knew how you felt all along, but I pretended not to see it
and took \n[1] away...

...So, from now on, be happy for all the times you held back until now. With \n[1],
just the two of you, forever...

...The talk is over now. I'm really glad I got to see you one last time, Elly-chan.
But...there's no time left... You have to go back to the village.

...! N-no! Mana-chan, come with me! I just want to be by your side...! That's enough
for me!

...No, I can't go. The two of us are going to take a different path from everyone
else from now on. I can't follow you down that path.

...! Th-that can't be...! No, no way...! It has to be with Mana-chan too...!
W-wahhh...!
O-okay! Elly-chan, you...! There, there...! You're a grown-up now, so no crying...!

Waaahhh, Mana-chan.........! I'm sorry, I'm so sorry... It's my fault, because of
me.........! Ugh, hic...! W-waaaahhh.........!

Hehe... Well then, go save \n[1]! Don't worry! I know the power of those eyes better
than anyone!
...Big brother........ That's right... I have to save big brother.........

The village is that way! Walk straight ahead, don't look back... ...Don't come back
halfway, okay!
...Hehe. Goodbye, Elly-chan. Meeting you guys made me truly happy.

......... Mmm, yeah. I'm the one who should say... Mana-chan, thank you for
everything........ ....See you again, Mana-chan.........

......... Hey, what if........ If we could be reborn and be together as three
again...

Next time, let's go on an adventure together, all three of us! That would definitely
be more fun!

...! Mmm, yeah! Next time, I'll definitely follow you...! No matter what happens next
time, I won't leave you two! ...Ugh...!

...! Hehe~, you said it, Elly-chan...! It's a promise! Next time, I'll definitely
take you with us!

...Hey, Elly-chan? If you don't hurry, \n[1] will be waiting, you know? Go save that
person I love so much?

Hehe... \n[1] has always protected you, Elly-chan. It's okay to be protected by your
little sister once in a while!

Mmm... Don't make that face? If my best friend is sad, it makes me sad too~...! I
want you to be smiling, Elly-chan!

C-cute~! Little Elly-chan, you're too cute~...! Uhe~...! I really wanted Elly-chan as
my little sister~...!

W-well, if you're going to say that...! I was thinking I'd like Mana-chan as my
little sister too!
Uhe~, is that so~... Elly-chan also, me as her... Huh? L-little sister!?
That's wrong! I'm the big sister~! I'm older than Elly-chan, you know~!?

...Huh? No, I know that, but Mana-chan, with that cuteness, being the big sister is
impossible, right?

M-muu... Well, fine! Either way! If I can be with Elly-chan forever, I don't mind
being the little sister!

...! U, ...! W-well, me too...! If I can be with Mana-chan, I don't care which~...!
Sob! ...Waaah~~~...!
Ah geez, don't cry, Elly-chan...! Here's a handkerchief! Blow your nose, chiiin~...?

......... Fufu~! This is a high big sister point score, right~? With this, I'm one
step ahead as the big sister!

Sob... F-fufu... what's with those points........ Where did that come from...?
Fufu.........

......... Elly-chan, I want to talk much, much more too, but we're going to run out
of time soon...

...Well then, Elly-chan. I've always cherished you like a little sister. ...From now
on, for my whole life, I'll be watching over you so you two can be happy.

...One last thing, Elly-chan. That power you inherited from "that child" is the Demon
King's Evil Eye that plunges people into terror and makes monsters obey.

That power will be a great help in clearing your difficult path... but at the same
time, your heart will be tormented by that cursed power. ...You might forget your
love for people.

But it's okay! Because you have \n[1] by your side! With the power of your love for
each other, I'm sure you won't change!

...But, if in the distant future, \n[1] goes somewhere... at that time, I'll come to
help you! So rest assured, and live your future life happily!

...Well then, Elly-chan. This really is the last time, so let me say what I want to
say, okay?
Fuu... Elly-chan! Thank you for teaching me so many different things!

Thanks to you, I was able to become such a fine adult! I traveled the world and made
lots of people smile! With the cookies you taught me, I was able to make the person I
love happy too!

I hated my old self who was timid and withdrawn...! That's why, Elly-chan! I wanted
to be like you...! I kept chasing after your back! And that's how I got here...!

...! .........! Even without such power, Elly-chan is an amazing girl! Why...! Why
did it have to turn out like this!? Uu...!

...U, hehe........ Sorry, I decided I wouldn't cry... Getting older makes you tear up
easily, it's awful, really.........

......... I love you, Elly-chan. I will never forget you... never forget you two
siblings. ...Meeting you two made me happy.

...Goodbye, Elly-chan. Please, don't cry anymore... Forget about me, look forward...
and live.........
Mana-chan!? Wait!? Wait, please!? Uwaah...! Uwee...!

...Guh, hic... Don't cry, you said... Don't say that at the very end... If Mana-chan
says that to me, I... h, uu...
...I have to go... I have to get to my brother...
...Guh, uu... I-it hurts...! G-guh, cough! Hah...! What in the world, ...!?
W-what's this... blood... It's not just my blood... What happened here...?

...It's noisy outside. I have a bad feeling something terrible has happened... I have
to go check...
U, guh...! Everyone's dead...!? Did someone kill them...? Damn it, how cruel...

...I can feel an incredibly strong magical power, even I can tell. The one who
attacked everyone is waiting ahead...
Ah, \n[1]... Thank you. It's thanks to you two. I was able to regain my true body.

From now on, we demons will gather under our new queen. The battle to protect her
against the foolish humans will begin. Fufu... Of course, you'll come with us,
\n[1]...?

...What the new queen wishes for depends on you. If that one becomes stained with
hatred, the same thing will repeat.

All demons must obey her will. So \n[1]... only you can admonish the queen. Please
betray humanity and keep us away from hatred.

It looks like he tried to gouge out his own eyes and scoop out his brain. Unable to
bear the pain, his clenched teeth are broken... Why did he fall into such madness...

Everyone was trying to kill you, brother... They were furious, saying punishment for
the one who defiled our ancestors... So I tried to save you, brother... b-but...

Everyone looked into my eyes and went crazy... Just by meeting their gaze, that's all
it took... They all became terrified of something and started hurting themselves like
mad...

...But you're different, aren't you, brother? You're not scared at all when you look
at me. ...As I thought, you're the only one I have.

Ah... I couldn't protect you, could I...? Because I was weak... I turned you into
this... monster...
Brother... Please, stay with me... I don't want to be alone anymore...
...Yeah. Of course, Elly. From now on, I'll always be by your side.

I walked up to Elly and took her hand. Letting go of punishing my sister, who caused
this tragedy, as a human. The two of us chose to stray from the path of humanity
together.

Mana, I'm sorry... I can't go back to that side anymore... Elly and I will bear this
sin together from now on...

...I'm so happy... The truth is, I... always wanted to go on adventures with you and
Mana-chan. I really hated just waiting in the village alone, scared...

I see... I'm sorry, Elly. If I had faced you sooner... If we had talked together
more, this wouldn't have...
...No, it's okay. If I can be with you forever from now on, that's all I need...
Well then, shall we begin? Our adventure together...
イベントにインポート
取り込み元フォルダ名 = text
取り込み元ファイル名 = message.txt
【取り扱い注意】上書きする = true
